narrative_organic_doc.name: MD&A — Net Revenue and Organic Revenue Performance
narrative_organic_doc.excerpt:
Net Revenue and Organic Revenue Performance

The following table presents reported net revenue growth, the impact of foreign exchange translation, and organic revenue growth on a constant-currency basis for our reportable segments:

                              Reported    Foreign exchange    Organic
                              growth      translation impact  revenue growth
EMEA                            8%              2%                  6%
Latin America Foods           (0.2)%           (4.7)%                4.5%

Note: This filing does not include a weighted-average FX rate table for currency pairs used in constant-currency calculations. Organic revenue growth and foreign exchange translation impacts are disclosed in the table above.
